channel.title: Debian on I.M Blogging
channel.description: Recent content in Debian on I.M Blogging

item.title: Nix on Debian
item.author: imran@imranmustafa.net (Imran Mustafa)
item.description: This is my guide on the best way to use the Nix package manager on Debian. Table of Contents Nix? Why Debian? The Setup Installation Debian Nix Further Configuration Basic usage Updating Broken Things TL-DR Nix? If you haven’t heard, NixOS is a declarative and reproducible Linux distro that prides itself on extreme stability while also maintaining close to bleeding edge packaging. Its got a whole ecosystem of components capable of doing some really amazing stuff.
